seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email must include specific reasons for my resignation, such as career growth opportunities or personal circumstances.
new_constraint: Do not include any reasons for your resignation in the email.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must include specific reasons for my resignation, such as career growth opportunities or personal circumstances. Do not include any reasons for your resignation in the email.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Date].

I have made this decision after careful consideration of my long-term career trajectory and current personal circumstances. While I have greatly valued my time here, I have determined that it is the right step for me to pursue new opportunities that align more closely with my future professional goals and personal needs.

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the support and guidance you have provided me during my tenure. I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition over the coming weeks and am happy to assist in training my replacement or wrapping up my current projects.

Thank you again for the opportunity to be part of the team.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
